title: Fennx's Power Origins
description: An awesome adventure where the origins mod combines with others to make a vanilla friendly and balanced out experience.
body:
# **FENNX'S POWER ORIGINS**

An amazing adventure that combines vanilla Minecraft with the origins mod to create the perfect balance of mods and vanilla! It adds super powers to the game which allow you to do all sorts of things such as climbing walls and having a permanent elytra.
